SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppUserDetails
AppUserDetails is a custom implementation of Spring Security's UserDetails interface.
AuthController
Controller for handling authentication-related endpoints such as registration and login.
AuthControllerTest
AuthControllerTest is a test class for the AuthController, which handles user registration and login.
AuthRequest
Data transfer object for authentication requests, containing the user's email and password.
Booking
Represents a booking made by a user for a specific event.
BookingController
Controller class for handling booking-related HTTP requests.
BookingRepository
Repository interface for managing Booking entities.
BookingService
Service class for managing booking-related operations.
CustomUserDetailsService
CustomUserDetailsService is a service that implements UserDetailsService to load user details from the database.
Event
Represents an event that users can book tickets for.
EventController
EventController is a REST controller that handles HTTP requests related to events.
EventDataSeeder
This component seeds Event data into database on application startup.
EventRepository
Repository interface for managing Event entities.
EventService
Service class for managing event-related operations.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Global exception handler for the application.
JwtAuthFilter
JwtAuthFilter is a filter that intercepts incoming HTTP requests to validate the JWT token.
JwtSecurityConfig
Configuration class for setting up JWT-based security in the application.
JwtUtil
JwtUtil is a utility class that provides methods for generating and validating JWT tokens.
Payment
Represents a payment made for a booking.
PaymentController
Controller class for handling payment-related API endpoints.
PaymentRepository
Repository interface for managing Payment entities.
PaymentResponse
Data transfer object for returning payment details along with the associated customer's name.
PaymentService
Service class for managing payment-related operations.
PaymentStatus
Represents the status of a payment.
RegisterRequest
Data transfer object for user registration requests, containing the user's email, password, first name, and last name.
Role
Represents the role of a user in the system.
TestJacksonConfig
TestJacksonConfig is a test configuration class that provides a custom ObjectMapper bean for testing purposes.
TicketnestBackendApplication
Main application class for the RESTful service, responsible for bootstrapping the Spring Boot application.
User
Represents a user in the system.
UserController
REST controller for managing users.
UserRepository
Repository interface for managing User entities.
UserService
Service class for managing user-related operations.
